title: Formatting a Name
scenario: Write a prompt that generates a formatted version of a given name (e.g., 'John Smith') in a specific format (e.g., 'Last, First')
constraints: Must use the specified name format

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated name adheres to the word count and name format constraints.
Verify if the generated name follows the specified name format.
Check if the generated name uses proper punctuation (e.g., comma, period).
